untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'multi-candle accumulation zone' (multiple tests without close near level) and identification of shadow-only touches. These require lookback pattern recognition and zone-definition logic not expressible via single-bar indicator comparisons. Specifically: (1) accumulation_zone_width_percent, (2) minimum_accumulation_tests count, (3) shadow_touch_threshold_percent detection across historical candles, and (4) zone boundary definition are all untranslatable to single-condition rules. Approximated entry with lower_wick magnitude and volume confirmation as a proxy, but true accumulation zone validation is beyond the rule engine's scope.
translation_notes: Approximated the spring/reversal pattern within accumulation context using lower_wick as proxy for 'spring bar tests below support', close > 75th percentile of range (body_pct) as proxy for 'upper portion close', and vol_ratio_20 for volume confirmation. However, the core requirement—identifying and confirming a multi-candle accumulation zone with shadow-only touches—requires multi-bar pattern detection and zone-building logic not available in single-bar comparisons. Recommend implementing as custom zone-detection module upstream of rule engine.
